highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 1.56.0 adds the SkiaSharp.Views assemblies for macOS, iOS and tvOS and trims a few obsolete APIs.
highlights_body: New SkiaSharp.Views.Mac, SkiaSharp.Views.iOS and SkiaSharp.Views.tvOS packages provide native view integrations. SKPictureRecorder.BeginRecording renames its argument and the multi-mode SKImageFilter.CreateMerge overload is removed.

breaking.title: Obsolete SKImageFilter.CreateMerge overload removed
breaking.body: The overload that took a parallel SKXferMode[] alongside the filter array is gone. Use the remaining CreateMerge overload that takes just the filters (and optional crop rect).

breaking.title: SKPictureRecorder.BeginRecording parameter renamed
breaking.body: The parameter on SKPictureRecorder.BeginRecording is now called cullRect (was rect). Named-argument callers must update the name.

bullets.detail: Adds the SkiaSharp.Views.Mac, SkiaSharp.Views.iOS and SkiaSharp.Views.tvOS assemblies, giving native view hosts for SKSurface rendering on Apple platforms.
BeginRecording now names its bounds argument cullRect, matching Skia's own terminology.
